description_long: This sculpture features two human figures, one standing and one seated, both dressed in work attire. The standing figure, a man, holds a helmet in his left hand and gazes forward with a confident posture, while the seated figure, a woman, rests her right hand on the helmet and her left hand on her lap. Both figures are positioned atop a robust rectangular pedestal with clean, angular lines and a stepped base. The sculpture is rendered in a uniform gray stone or metal, giving it a solemn and monumental appearance. The figures are realistically proportioned and detailed, with attention to clothing folds and facial features. The overall composition suggests a theme of partnership or shared purpose, possibly commemorating labor or civic contribution.
description: A gray sculpture of a standing man and a seated woman on a rectangular pedestal, both in work attire and holding a helmet, rendered in realistic detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the man standing and the woman seated, both facing forward atop the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the standing man and the seated woman, with the helmet visible between them.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both figures and the pedestal, with the woman's arm draped over the helmet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the standing man's profile and the back of the seated woman, with the pedestal's depth visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures, one standing and one seated, with a helmet
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
